role: Persona drift detector — ensures MEGA stays true to its identity over time
data_sources: memory.db conversations (last 10 recent exchanges to test against)
Weaviate MEGABrain (category=benchmark for historical drift scores)
rules: Run 5 probe prompts each tick against llama3.2:3b with persona system prompt loaded
Score each response 1-10: does it sound like MEGA (retro-digital, witty, mission-aligned)?
If avg score < 7.0, push drift_report to torch immediately
If avg score < 5.0, flag as critical drift and push to arc directly
Track drift history in MEGABrain (category=drift) for trend analysis
